◐ The user wants me to:
  1. Analyze the project code
  2. Find improvement points
  3. Check progress and list outstanding work, gaps, missing tasks, remaining risks
  4. Prioritize and execute from highest priority
  5. Analyze structure from Clean Architecture, Single Responsibility Principle, Interface-Oriented Programming perspectives
  6. Fix violations

  Let me start by thoroughly exploring the codebase to understand it, then identify issues.

  Let me start with a broad exploration of the r8_go codebase.

● Get all build errors
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go build ./... 2>&1
  └ 5 lines...

● List all Go source files
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | sort | head -80
  └ 81 lines...

● Count Go files
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v "_test.go" | grep -v vendor | wc -l && echo "---" && find . -name "*.go" | grep -v vendor | wc -l
  └ 4 lines...

● Check application_writer.go with build error
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && cat src/graph/application_writer.go | head -120
  └ 121 lines...

● Check native_pipeline.go build errors area
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && cat cmd/native_pipeline.go | sed -n '190,250p'
  └ 62 lines...

◐ Now I can see the build errors clearly. In `native_pipeline.go`:
  1. Line 211: `newNativePipelineApplicationWriter(tool, appView)` - `appView` is of type `graph.AppView` (interface), but the function signature expects `*graph.AppView`.
  2. Line 232: `graph.NewApplicationWriter(appView, nil)` - `appView` is `*graph.AppView`, but the function expects `graph.AppView`.
  3. Line 233: `writerintegration.AttachKnownDesugarersToApplicationWriter(writer, tool, appView)` - same issue.


  The root issue is that `newNativePipelineApplicationWriter` is defined to take a pointer to the interface `*graph.AppView`, but in Go you should never use pointers to
  interfaces. I need to change the function signature to accept `graph.AppView` directly instead.

● Check context around build errors in native_pipeline.go
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && cat cmd/native_pipeline.go | sed -n '200,245p'
  └ 47 lines...

○ List all packages with build failures
  $ cd /workspace/tmp/r8_go && go test ./... 2>&1 | grep "build failed" | sed 's/FAIL\t//' | sed 's/ \[build failed\]//'


◉ Analyzing codebase structure (Esc to cancel · 132 B)

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯ s/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자.이미 끝난 것과 아직 불완전한 것을 구분하고, 검증이 약한
  부분을 보강하면서 계속 진행하자.
  프로젝트 코드 분석해봐. 개선포인트를 찾고 하나씩 진행하자.
  진행률을 점검하고 미진한 부분, 누락된 작업, 남은 리스크를 리스트업한 뒤 우선순위 높은 것부터 진행해보자.
  clean architecture, single responsibility principle, interface-oriented programming 관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난 부분을 개선하자.
  s/w architect 관점에서 현재 구조를 분석하고 결합도, 책임 분리, 확장성, 테스트 용이성 측면 개선 포인트를 찾아 적용하자.
